generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that even our closest allies are cutting defense budgets while we're being asked to spend more? Germany just announced a 10% reduction in their military spending, and yet we're told we need to increase ours to maintain NATO commitments. Doesn't it make you question who's really carrying their weight? #DefendAmerica #FairShare
